data.title: Stellar (XLM) could reach $0.28-$0.31 in 30 days, aiming for a 33-48% increase if it breaks $0.22 resistance.
data.description: Stellar's XLM is anticipated to reach $0.28-$0.31 in the upcoming month, with the coin currently facing a crucial $0.22 support examination. If resistance levels are breached, there is a potential 33-48% increase in value.

data.title: TRON aims for $0.32 rally in December with MACD bullish and $0.29 resistance key for investors, predicts TRX price.
data.description: Forecasters predict that the price of TRX could surge to $0.32 in the next 2-3 weeks, driven by bullish momentum indicated by MACD. TRON investors are advised to keep an eye on the key resistance level of $0.29 as a potential turning point.

data.title: LTC aims for $95-$107 by Jan 2025 with a positive MACD. $82 support intact, RSI at 40 signals a potential rebound.
data.description: Litecoin is setting a target range of $95 to $107 by January 2025, supported by a positive turn in the MACD histogram. The crucial support level at $82 has been maintained, indicating potential reversal as the RSI stands at 40, signifying oversold conditions. This forecast suggests a positive outlook for Litecoin's price movement in the coming years.

data.title: Chainlink may reach $15.50 in 30 days, indicating a 27% increase. It currently faces a $13.08 resistance level.
data.description: The forecast for the price of LINK suggests a possible increase of 27% to reach $15.50 in the next 30 days. Chainlink is currently on the verge of being oversold, highlighting a promising trend. However, for this projection to materialize, it is imperative for Chainlink to surpass the resistance level of $13.08.

data.title: AVAX price aims for $13.22 rebound in 2-4 weeks on bullish momentum, signaling 8% potential gain despite trading below moving averages.
data.description: The forecast for AVAX suggests a potential 8% increase, with a medium-term target of $13.22, as the MACD momentum signals a bullish trend even though the coin is currently trading below important moving averages.

data.title: Polkadot aims for $2.40 rebound despite weakness, with 38% upside potential indicated by technical analysis. Support at $1.71 crucial.
data.description: Forecasts indicate that the price of DOT is expected to rebound to $2.40 in the next 2-4 weeks, driven by bullish divergence in the MACD histogram. However, it is crucial to note that the immediate support level at $1.71 will play a vital role in the price movement.

data.title: NFT collections see market hit all-time low in 2025, with decrease in buyers, sellers, and transactions.
data.description: Data from the market indicated a decrease in activity within the NFT space, as the number of buyers, sellers, and transactions has declined. This trend suggests a waning interest in speculative investments related to NFTs.
